name: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding processes cause delays in employee productivity. We automate the generation and distribution of customized onboarding materials instead of manual creation.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
problem_solved: Difficulty in creating customized onboarding materials for new employees.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in creating customized onboarding materials for new employees.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding processes cause delays in employee productivity. We automate the generation and distribution of customized onboarding materials instead of manual creation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual creation of onboarding documents and materials.

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding processes cause delays in employee productivity. We automate the generation and distribution of customized onboarding materials instead of manual creation.
